name: TMDB Movie Database
description: Movie details and search powered by The Movie Database (TMDB). Requires a free API key from themoviedb.org.
examples: tell me about the movie Inception
when did The Matrix come out

global.label: TMDB API key
global.description: Server-wide key for The Movie Database.

user.label: Your TMDB API key (optional)
user.description: Overrides the global key for your account.
